name: Lemon Roast Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 3 to 3-1/2 lb chicken, rinsed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Wash and dry the chicken. Poke 10-15 holes in each lemon and stuff them into the cavity of the chicken.
3. Truss or tie the chicken securely.
4. Place the chicken on a rack, breast side down.
5. Roast for 25 minutes.
6. Turn the chicken over and roast for another 25 minutes.
7. Increase the oven temperature to 400°F and continue roasting for an additional 25 minutes, or until juices run clear.
8. Transfer the chicken to a platter and remove any strings.
9. Let the chicken rest for 5-15 minutes before carving.
